mechanics.excerpt: Much of the equipment they use differs little from that of the Star League the Iate twenty eighth century: The one exception medical technology; where spin-offs from the eugenics program have given the Clans phenomenal advantage Using highly advanced life support and regeneration techniques_ the Clans can regrow ay part of the body save the brain; Their genetic moditication techniques are similarly sophisticated_ The eugenics program uses these extensively; along with artificial gestation systems known as iron wombs Though such systems are far from new; the need for rapid pOp ulation increase prompted Nicholas Kerensky and his scientific teams t0 abandon the ethica restrictions the use such technologies that had existed since the end of the twentieth century.
